title: Create: Security Program
description: 💳 Secure your factories and add tickets to your train network!
body:
![Mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06ffd75678bd578ede4ef4c9b303d4cf3e96acb4.png)

[![Discord Link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7d437cbe00c4c4d693900b0e41e3a293a84a31b.png)](https://discord.gg/3AvrppcgG3)

[![Donate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e79bfe6b479f2a23fad07b79b13d88d027ae422e.png)](https://to0pa.net/donate)

### Create Security Program allow you to create encrypted Cards and Tickets!

**Card:** The card can be reused infinitly **Ticket:** Every time you use a ticket, it get consumed

**Card inscriber:** The card inscriber let you enter a 3 items code, a card tier from 1 to 5, and a mode between "universal" and "player". Universal cards can be recreated by every players if they found the right code. Player cards are secured with you username and cannot be reproduced by other players.

**Card Reader:** Set you card and card tier by right clicking with an exemple card. Every time the card or ticket is right, the card reader will power redstone.

**Ticket Gate:** The ticket gate will open if you click on it with the correct card or ticket

Compatible with Create **Update 5** and **Update 6**

\==== Sponsor ====

[![Sponsor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/060ea25c304c36bb48e61db95e82269d2bc69c2a.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/wrench)
